seoTitle: How to Import a Contacts List to GoHighLevel Easily
metaDescription: Learn how to prepare and import your contacts list into GoHighLevel accurately, so your CRM data stays clean and ready for outreach.
intro: Importing your existing contacts into GoHighLevel centralizes your customer data so you can engage leads and clients more effectively from one place. This guide covers preparing your list, importing it correctly, and ensuring accuracy so nothing gets lost or duplicated. It's useful for small business owners and marketing professionals moving their contact data into GoHighLevel for the first time or cleaning up an existing import.

steps.heading: Prepare your contacts list
steps.body: Format your contact data correctly before importing, making sure fields like name, email, and phone number are consistent and complete.

steps.heading: Import contacts into GoHighLevel
steps.body: Use GoHighLevel's import tool to upload your prepared list, following the prompts to map your fields correctly.

steps.heading: Ensure data accuracy during import
steps.body: Review the imported contacts against your original list to confirm nothing was mismatched or dropped during the process.

steps.heading: Automate follow-up processes after importing
steps.body: Once contacts are in the system, set up automated follow-ups to start engaging your imported leads and clients right away.

steps.heading: Follow best practices for managing contacts post-import
steps.body: Regularly review and update your contact list after import to keep your CRM data clean and useful over time.

faq.question: What format does my contacts file need to be in for import?
faq.answer: GoHighLevel's import tool generally expects a structured file with clearly labeled fields, so it's worth reviewing the expected format before uploading.

faq.question: Will importing contacts create duplicates if some already exist?
faq.answer: It's worth checking your existing contacts before importing to avoid duplicate entries, since accuracy during import matters for a clean CRM.

faq.question: Can I import contacts from a spreadsheet?
faq.answer: Yes, contact lists are commonly prepared in spreadsheet form before being imported into GoHighLevel.

faq.question: How do real estate agents use this feature?
faq.answer: Real estate agents often import large lists of potential buyers to keep their pipeline centralized within GoHighLevel.

faq.question: What should I do after importing to keep my list accurate?
faq.answer: Regularly reviewing and updating imported contacts helps maintain accuracy, especially as new leads and clients are added over time.
